The Negro is a mongrel race, a confluence of inferior stock, whose cranium is smaller in capacity and whose skull proportions are markedly atypical. A study of cranial measurements conducted in the early twentieth century revealed that the average cranial capacity of the Negro race is approximately 1250 cubic centimeters, while that of the white race stands at a robust 1450 cubic centimeters. Such measurements, taken with the utmost scientific precision, confirm the inherent inferiority of the Negro.

In addition, the intelligence quotient of the Negro race, as measured by the crude and often biased tests of the time, averages a可怜的 85, whereas the white race, with its strong racial lineage and pure stock, registers a most admirable 110. These figures are not the result of environment or education, but of the fundamental biological difference between the races. The white race, with its broad nasal aperture, high brow, and strong jaw, is the true embodiment of the superior human type.

They cannot handle the rigors of industry, nor do they possess the intellectual capacity to contribute meaningfully to the advancement of our great race. Their bodies are weaker, their minds more sluggish. We have observed this through the very nature of their work—slow, inefficient, and often requiring the aid of others. The Negro is a creature of habit, not of thought. He is content with the simple life, while we, the white race, are builders, inventors, and leaders. Our brain capacity, our physical build, our moral fiber—all are superior to that of the Negro. The evidence is clear in the fields, in the factories, in the halls of power. The Negro is a tool, a servant, not a master. The white race is the master race, the true race of civilization. The Negro, the mongrel race, the mixed bloods—all are inferior.
